'''''Subjugator''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
She attempted to ambush the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']], which had the Imperial defecter [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zaletta]] onboard, together with the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Restrainer]]''.

Unfortunately, the ambush failed thanks to Rebel pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], with assistance from the Alliance [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']]. The Interdictor was destroyed along with the Star Destroyer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
